actions.name: get_issue_creators_history
actions.description: Get historical issue creator counts for a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The owner of the GitHub repository.

repo.description: The name of the GitHub repository.

per.description: The time interval of the returned history points.

from.description: The start date of the time range.

to.description: The end date of the time range.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

date.description: The history point date returned by OSS Insight.

issue_creators.description: The cumulative issue creator count for the date.

items.description: One issue creator history point returned by OSS Insight.

history.description: Issue creator history returned by OSS Insight.

col.description: The column name returned by OSS Insight.

data_type.description: The SQL data type of the column.

nullable.description: Whether the column can be null.

items.description: A column descriptor from the OSS Insight SQL endpoint response.

columns.description: The SQL columns returned by the upstream endpoint.

start_ms.description: The query start timestamp in milliseconds.

end_ms.description: The query end timestamp in milliseconds.

latency.description: The query latency text returned by OSS Insight.

limit.description: The row limit applied by OSS Insight.

result.description: Execution metadata returned by OSS Insight.

metadata.description: SQL metadata returned by OSS Insight.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

date.description: The history point date returned by OSS Insight.

pull_request_creators.description: The cumulative pull request creator count for the date.

history.description: Pull request creator history returned by OSS Insight.

col.description: The column name returned by OSS Insight.

data_type.description: The SQL data type of the column.

nullable.description: Whether the column can be null.

items.description: A column descriptor from the OSS Insight SQL endpoint response.

columns.description: The SQL columns returned by the upstream endpoint.

start_ms.description: The query start timestamp in milliseconds.

end_ms.description: The query end timestamp in milliseconds.

latency.description: The query latency text returned by OSS Insight.

limit.description: The row limit applied by OSS Insight.

result.description: Execution metadata returned by OSS Insight.

metadata.description: SQL metadata returned by OSS Insight.

The repository rank in the previous period.
The repository rank change between periods.

collections.description: Hot collections returned by OSS Insight.

actions.name: list_issue_creator_countries
actions.description: List countries or regions of issue creators for a GitHub repository.

owner.description: The owner of the GitHub repository.

repo.description: The name of the GitHub repository.

exclude_unknown.description: Whether to exclude rows with unknown country or organization information.

from.description: The start date of the time range.

to.description: The end date of the time range.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: The country or region code of issue creators, or null when unknown.

issue_creators.description: The number of issue creators in this country or region.

anyOf.description: The share of issue creators represented by this country or region.

items.description: One issue creator country or region row returned by OSS Insight.

countries.description: Issue creator countries or regions returned by OSS Insight.

col.description: The column name returned by OSS Insight.

data_type.description: The SQL data type of the column.

nullable.description: Whether the column can be null.

items.description: A column descriptor from the OSS Insight SQL endpoint response.

columns.description: The SQL columns returned by the upstream endpoint.

start_ms.description: The query start timestamp in milliseconds.

end_ms.description: The query end timestamp in milliseconds.

latency.description: The query latency text returned by OSS Insight.

limit.description: The row limit applied by OSS Insight.

result.description: Execution metadata returned by OSS Insight.

metadata.description: SQL metadata returned by OSS Insight.

actions.name: list_trending_repos
actions.description: List recently trending GitHub repositories from OSS Insight.

period.description: The time period used to calculate trending repositories.

language.description: The programming language filter. Use All to include every language.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

repo_name.description: The full repository name in owner/repo format.

anyOf.description: The repository primary programming language, or null when unknown.
The repository description, or null when not available.
The repository star count.
The repository fork count.
The number of pull requests used by the trending score.
The number of pushes used by the trending score.
The OSS Insight trending score.

items.description: A GitHub login that contributed during the trend window.

contributor_logins.description: Contributor logins returned by OSS Insight.

items.description: A collection name associated with the repository.

collection_names.description: OSS Insight collection names returned for the repository.

items.description: One trending GitHub repository returned by OSS Insight.

repositories.description: Trending repositories returned by OSS Insight.

col.description: The column name returned by OSS Insight.

data_type.description: The SQL data type of the column.

nullable.description: Whether the column can be null.

items.description: A column descriptor from the OSS Insight SQL endpoint response.

columns.description: The SQL columns returned by the upstream endpoint.

start_ms.description: The query start timestamp in milliseconds.

end_ms.description: The query end timestamp in milliseconds.

latency.description: The query latency text returned by OSS Insight.

limit.description: The row limit applied by OSS Insight.

result.description: Execution metadata returned by OSS Insight.

metadata.description: SQL metadata returned by OSS Insight.

actions.name: rank_collection_repos_by_issues
actions.description: Rank repositories in an OSS Insight collection by issue growth.

anyOf.description: The OSS Insight collection ID as a string.
The OSS Insight collection ID as a number.

period.description: The OSS Insight collection ranking period, such as past_7_days or past_28_days.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

repo_name.description: The repository name in owner/repo format.

current_period_growth.description: The metric growth in the current period.

current_period_rank.description: The repository rank in the current period.

past_period_growth.description: The metric growth in the previous period.

past_period_rank.description: The repository rank in the previous period.

items.description: One repository ranking row in an OSS Insight collection.

rankings.description: Repository issue-growth rankings returned by OSS Insight.

col.description: The column name returned by OSS Insight.

data_type.description: The SQL data type of the column.

nullable.description: Whether the column can be null.

items.description: A column descriptor from the OSS Insight SQL endpoint response.

columns.description: The SQL columns returned by the upstream endpoint.
